data.title: Bitcoin may face a crash under $60K, possibly delaying recovery until 2027 as data suggests each new low prolongs BTC's rebound.
data.description: The possibility of Bitcoin reaching its peak value again hinges on the depth of the ongoing selloff, with data indicating that for each new low in the price, the time taken for BTC to recover is extended by several months.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- FunL/
data.description: FunL is marking close to a year of presence on Amazon with strong sales figures. The company is preparing to make its debut at the National Hardware Show in 2026. This news was shared in a press release issued by FunL through PR Newswire on March 25, 2026. The company has reported positive growth in sales numbers and is looking forward to showcasing its products at the upcoming event.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs experience $296M outflows after 4 weeks of inflows due to market uncertainty.
data.description: Weekly outflows of $296 million have been observed in spot Bitcoin ETFs following a month of continuous inflows, attributed to lingering macro uncertainty preventing capital from entering the market.

data.title: Aphranel Founder Invited by People's Daily to Discuss Long-Term Development in China's Medical Aesthetics Sector
data.description: On March 28, 2026, Lin Guangming, the creator of Moyom Biotechnology and the Aphranel brand, was asked to join a conversation regarding China's medical aesthetics field during the nation's yearly legislative and advisory gatherings in Shanghai. Lin's presence underscored his notable impact in the industry.

data.title: XRP sees higher whale accumulation increasing risk-reward potential amid fragile futures market conditions.
data.description: XRP is demonstrating enhanced risk-adjusted returns as whale transfers increase, reaching record highs. However, the futures market appears unstable due to escalating leverage usage and frequent liquidations.

data.title: Vivoryon Therapeutics N.V. Provides Update on Growing Body of Evidence Validating Glutaminyl Cyclases as Promising Targets in DKD at World Congress of Nephrology
data.description: Recent findings from the Company's varoglutamstat Phase 2 program were shared during the World Congress of Nephrology. Key data analyses included significant insights into the drug's efficacy and safety profiles. The program involved over 500 participants and showed promising results in improving kidney function in patients with chronic kidney disease. This groundbreaking research marks a crucial advancement in the treatment of this condition and offers hope to millions of individuals worldwide.

data.title: 'Dr. Doom' Nouriel Roubini Warns Trump May Escalate Iran War: 'If He Chickens Out Right Now...'
data.description: Renowned economist Nouriel Roubini, famous for predicting the 2008 financial crisis, shared his insights on the escalating U.S.-Iran conflict. Roubini warned that President Donald Trump might opt for intensification rather than a swift resolution. Despite hopes for a peace deal, Roubini believes Trump is unlikely to seek an "off-ramp" to end the war. The economist emphasized that backing down now could damage Trump's credibility and impact his reelection prospects. Roubini characterized the situation as a high-risk, high-reward scenario, where escalating tensions by targeting key Iranian assets and ramping up military operations could yield a geopolitical advantage. Roubini speculated that, contrary to expectations, Trump may choose to escalate the conflict. However, failure to handle the situation tactfully could lead to serious global repercussions. The complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Lummis highlights CLARITY Act for offering top developer safeguards. Legal expert Jake Chervinsky notes focus on stablecoin yield.
data.description: Jake Chervinsky, a legal expert in the cryptocurrency field, noted that recent legislation concerning safeguarding crypto developers has received less attention compared to the increased emphasis on stablecoin yield within the CLARITY Act. This shift in focus has drawn away from crucial aspects of protecting developers in the crypto space. The specifics of this legislation and its potential impact have not been highlighted as much as the discussions around stablecoin yields.
David Sacks Slams Anthropic As 'Ruthless' Amid Pentagon Clash: 'They're Not Always On The Side Of The Angels'

data.title: Sales of Jay Chou's "Children of the Sun" have exceeded 100 million RMB, as Tencent Music Entertainment Group Drives Global Rollout
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on March 28, 2026, Mandopop icon Jay Chou's latest album "Children of the Sun" was unveiled globally. The album, his 16th studio release, debuted on March 25, exclusively on Tencent Music Entertainment Group's services such as QQ Music, Kugou Music, and Kuwo Music. The album's reach and impact have been significant, with initial figures showing a widespread reception.

data.title: Global Waterproofing Chemicals Market to Reach USD 9.23 Billion by 2032, Growing at a CAGR of 4.69%, Says MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: In a recent report by MarkNtel Advisors, it was revealed that the Global Waterproofing Chemicals Market is expected to experience a 4.69% compound annual growth rate between 2026 and 2032. The surge in market expansion is largely attributed to the fast-paced urbanization trends taking place worldwide.

data.title: TCL Electronics (01070.HK) Achieving High-Quality Global Growth in 2025, with Adjusted Profit Attributable to Owners of the Parent and Dividends Surging by over 56%
data.description: Through the implementation of the dual-drive strategy focusing on "Globalisation" and "Mid-to-High-End" sectors, TCL Electronics experienced robust growth and improved profitability. In the fiscal year 2025, the company saw a notable 15.4% year-on-year revenue surge, indicative of its successful business approach.

data.title: Brazil Digestive Remedies Market to Reach USD 1.11 Billion by 2032, Says Vyansa Intelligence
data.description: A recent research study from Vyansa Intelligence reveals that the Brazil Digestive Remedies Market is forecasted to experience a 1.8% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) between 2026 and 2032. This growth is attributed to the increasing prevalence of digestive issues in the region.

data.title: Global Sustainable Wire & Cable Market to Reach USD 70.53 Billion by 2032 Amid Rising Demand for Eco-Friendly Power Infrastructure, Says MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: A recent research report by MarkNtel Advisors reveals that the Global Sustainable Wire & Cable Market is expected to experience a significant growth rate, with a projected CAGR of approximately 16.50% between 2026 and 2032. This growth is attributed to the rising focus on sustainability in the market.

data.title: Bybit P2P Meets Bybit Pay: 8,000 USDT Prize Pool Exclusive for Kenya
data.description: In Dubai, the UAE, on March 28, 2026, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally based on trading volume, unveiled a new promotional campaign featuring a time-limited opportunity for users in Kenya. The offer includes a total of 8,000 USDT in prizes up for grabs. Effective immediately and running until April 24, 2026, eligible Bybit P2P users and merchants in Kenya have the chance to win various rewards.

data.title: Stablecoins set to revolutionize crypto for businesses with trading volume surpassing $33 trillion in 2025, expected to hit $56.6 trillion by 2030.
data.description: In 2025, Brad Garlinghouse from Ripple highlighted the significant increase in stablecoin trading volume, reaching above $33 trillion. An analysis by Bloomberg has forecasted that stablecoin flows are expected to rise to $56.6 trillion by the year 2030.

data.title: Dow Jones Dives, Oil Prices Hits $100 Amid Iran War; Tesla Looms
data.description: Key stock market indexes experienced significant declines, reaching their lowest levels in six months, while oil prices approached the $100 mark due to escalating tensions with Iran. Additionally, investors are awaiting the upcoming Tesla delivery reports. The Dow Jones plunged amidst these developments, reflecting the broader economic uncertainties. This situation raises concerns about the impact of geopolitical conflicts on financial markets and global stability.
